as-ind-indore.author: Dilip kabiraj
as-ind-indore.why: Commons passenger schematic of Yellow Line; solid=operating (5 stations), dashed=under construction. Not alignment/construction map.

as-iri-tabriz.author: Ziraksima
as-iri-tabriz.why: Commons Line-1-only bilingual strip schematic (El Goli–Noor). Avoids official system map that draws unopened Lines 2–5 solid.

as-kor-gwangju.author: Tcfc2349
as-kor-gwangju.why: Commons Line-1 schematic with Korean station labels (Pyeongdong–Nokdong). Source SVG/PNG is transparent-bg (not dark); staged white-composite PNG for display. Not Line-2 planning geo.

as-vie-hanoi.license: © UrbanRail.Net / Robert Schwandl (thesis use; all rights reserved by author)
as-vie-hanoi.author: Robert Schwandl (UrbanRail.Net)
as-vie-hanoi.why: UrbanRail 2026 schematic of operating 2A+Line3 elevated; dashed=under construction; faded=planned. White bg. Commons alternatives were dark-theme or planning-as-open.

as-vie-ho-chi-minh-city.author: Dragfyre (enwiki)
as-vie-ho-chi-minh-city.why: Commons digital Line-1 strip schematic Ben Thanh–Suoi Tien (14 stations) on white; not station-board photos or MAUR geographic planning map.
